prompt: Brand colors: primary #0d9488, deep #0f766e. Illustration style: Flat geometric illustration, 2-3 color limit using brand palette, generous whitespace, no photorealism, soft edges, modern editorial feel. Style of Magoz meets Headspace's Christoph Niemann. Reference brands to mimic: Calm, Headspace, Mira, Linear. Avoid: stock photo silver-haired couple in wheat field; fake clinical iconography. A clean geometric placeholder tile for a corporate website avatar slot. Soft warm cream background. A single centered circle outlined with a thin teal ring, and inside the circle a simple abstract head and shoulders glyph as a flat muted slate gray shape with no facial features. Minimal, understated, generous padding. Absolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no real human faces. Flat vector icon style.
